channel.title: Basic Income Studies
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Basic Income Studies

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Blanca Tena Estrada, Nhat Luong DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bis-2024-frontmatter2

item.title: The Debate Over the Definition of Basic Income
item.description: Article by Blanca Tena Estrada, Nhat Luong DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bis-2024-0021

item.title: The Case for a Revision of BIEN’s Definition of Basic Income
item.description: Article by Blanca Tena Estrada, Nhat Luong DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bis-2023-0008

item.title: A Survey of Universal Basic Income Experiments
item.description: Article by Blanca Tena Estrada, Nhat Luong DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bis-2022-0003

item.title: Macroeconomic Observations on Paying for and Funding Universal Basic Income
item.description: Article by Blanca Tena Estrada, Nhat Luong DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bis-2023-0032

item.title: Exploring Young People’s Attitudes Towards Basic Income
item.description: Article by Blanca Tena Estrada, Nhat Luong DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bis-2022-0030

item.title: Is G.A. Cohen’s Egalitarian Ethos Consistent with Unconditional Basic Income?
item.description: Article by Blanca Tena Estrada, Nhat Luong DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bis-2022-0024

item.title: Unconditional Endowment and Acceptance of Taxes: A Lab-in-the-Field Experiment on UBI with Unemployed
item.description: Article by Blanca Tena Estrada, Nhat Luong DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bis-2023-0003
